title: Set out site for construction works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Set out site for construction works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare work

pcs.text: Interpret and compare site plans and specifications with other available plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and compare site plans and specifications with other available plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and compare site plans and specifications with other available plans.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment required for setting out construction works, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment required for setting out construction works, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment required for setting out construction works, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Interpret environmental impact of proposed construction works in conjunction with site plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret environmental impact of proposed construction works in conjunction with site plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret environmental impact of proposed construction works in conjunction with site plans.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare work

elements.title: Locate and mark out position of construction works

pcs.text: Locate existing site features from site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate existing site features from site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate existing site features from site plan.

pcs.text: Locate position of proposed construction works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate position of proposed construction works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate position of proposed construction works.

pcs.text: Using correct scale, transfer scale measurements of lines, shapes, angles and dimensions from site plan to site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Using correct scale, transfer scale measurements of lines, shapes, angles and dimensions from site plan to site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Using correct scale, transfer scale measurements of lines, shapes, angles and dimensions from site plan to site.

pcs.text: Mark out shape of proposed construction works on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark out shape of proposed construction works on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out shape of proposed construction works on site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Locate and mark out position of construction works

elements.title: Establish benchmark for construction works

pcs.text: Identify site datum from plans and specifications to ensure all existing and proposed construction works can be linked by survey equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site datum from plans and specifications to ensure all existing and proposed construction works can be linked by survey equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site datum from plans and specifications to ensure all existing and proposed construction works can be linked by survey equipment.

pcs.text: Find or establish suitable benchmark for site works according to site plans or specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Find or establish suitable benchmark for site works according to site plans or specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Find or establish suitable benchmark for site works according to site plans or specifications.

pcs.text: Set out correct reduced levels on site in comparison to benchmark based on plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set out correct reduced levels on site in comparison to benchmark based on plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set out correct reduced levels on site in comparison to benchmark based on plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Interpret reduced levels in relation to benchmark
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret reduced levels in relation to benchmark?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret reduced levels in relation to benchmark.

pcs.text: Calculate differences in heights on site or between reduced levels provided on plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate differences in heights on site or between reduced levels provided on plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate differences in heights on site or between reduced levels provided on plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Establish benchmark for construction works

elements.title: Take and verify site levels

pcs.text: Position levelling instrument to take, record and verify levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position levelling instrument to take, record and verify levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position levelling instrument to take, record and verify levels.

pcs.text: Describe appropriate procedures to follow if a levelling instrument is not accurate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe appropriate procedures to follow if a levelling instrument is not accurate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe appropriate procedures to follow if a levelling instrument is not accurate.

pcs.text: Take and record site readings, and verify readings are correct according to site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take and record site readings, and verify readings are correct according to site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take and record site readings, and verify readings are correct according to site plans and specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Take and verify site levels

elements.title: Complete work

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment in required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment in required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment in required location.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record site set out work activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record site set out work activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record site set out work activities according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
